content.scenarioHint: 教授质疑你的样本选择偏差，要求你解释如何确保样本的代表性
content.speakerText: Your sample only includes students from urban universities—how do you know this reflects the broader population?
content.speakerTextCn: 你的样本只包含来自城市大学的学生——你如何证明这能代表更广泛的人群？
expectedAnswers: I acknowledged this limitation in my methodology section and used stratified sampling within urban contexts to maximize internal validity.
You're right—it's a constraint. I plan to expand to rural institutions in the next phase with matched demographic controls.
While limited to urban areas, the sample size (n=420) and diversity within cities (income, major, year) help generalize within this context.
I used census data to weight responses by region and socioeconomic status, reducing sampling bias.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确回应了样本代表性的问题
语言准确性：语法、术语使用是否正确（如 stratified sampling, weighting, bias）
表达自然度：是否符合学术口语习惯，避免机械背诵
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 sample, representativeness, limitation, bias, generalization 等关键词

content.speakerText: Your qualitative analysis lacks a theoretical framework. How do you justify your approach?
content.speakerTextCn: 你的质性分析缺乏理论框架，你如何论证这种方法？
expectedAnswers: I adopted a grounded theory approach, allowing themes to emerge from the data rather than imposing a pre-existing framework.
While I didn’t start with a fixed theory, I later mapped emerging themes to existing literature in the discussion section.
The research question was exploratory, so I prioritized data-driven insights over theory-driven hypotheses.
evaluationCriteria: 是否明确说明方法论选择理由（如grounded theory、探索性研究）
是否联系理论与数据的关系（如mapping themes to literature）
是否避免空泛回应（如‘I just did what felt right’）并使用学术术语
